mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_ID, PARTICULAR_REGISTRATION_CODE, SPECIAL_DISCOVER_CYCLE, CERTIFI_TYPE, CERTIFI_TYPE_NAME, CERTIFI_CODE, RELEASE_DATE, CERTIFI_USER, EXPIRE_DATE, VALID_DATE, CERTIFI_STATE, REMARK, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_SPECIAL WHERE EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_SPECIAL ( ID, EQUIP_ID, PARTICULAR_REGISTRATION_CODE, SPECIAL_DISCOVER_CYCLE, CERTIFI_TYPE, CERTIFI_TYPE_NAME, CERTIFI_CODE, RELEASE_DATE, CERTIFI_USER, EXPIRE_DATE, VALID_DATE, CERTIFI_STATE, REMARK, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{particularRegistrationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialDiscoverCycle,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{certifiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certifiTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certifiCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{certifiUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{validDate,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{certifiState,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_SPECIAL
PARTICULAR_REGISTRATION_CODE = #{particularRegistrationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIAL_DISCOVER_CYCLE = #{specialDiscoverCycle,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CERTIFI_TYPE = #{certifiType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFI_TYPE_NAME = #{certifiTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CERTIFI_CODE = #{certifiCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RELEASE_DATE = #{releaseDate,jdbcType=DATE},
CERTIFI_USER = #{certifiUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXPIRE_DATE = #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE},
VALID_DATE = #{validDate,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CERTIFI_STATE = #{certifiState,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_M_EQPT_SPECIAL SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}
